sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: catechin content adds real upside because that gives it a useful compound story beyond the near-empty nutrition label. strong polyphenol reputation because the core appeal of green tea lives in its compounds and effects rather than classic nutrition composition. nearly zero-calorie daily use because a huge practical advantage in a category judged more by effect than macros.

sections.subtitleText: on the plus side: catechin content adds real upside because that gives it a useful compound story beyond the near-empty nutrition label. strong polyphenol reputation because the core appeal of green tea lives in its compounds and effects rather than classic nutrition composition. nearly zero-calorie daily use because a huge practical advantage in a category judged more by effect than macros.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: taste can be a barrier because not everyone enjoys it enough to use consistently. quality varies by source because the practical value depends somewhat on the product. can be a bit fussier than grab-and-go drinks because a tiny practical downside, but not a serious one.

closing.summary: Green Tea has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
closing.useCaseNote: Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
